playlist.title: ACID — A Black-Heritage Canon (1986–2026)
playlist.description: Three notable acid tracks per year since acid's inception, every entry with core Black-artist involvement. Sourced from the YouTube links on each track's Discogs release page. Companion document: acid-playlist.md (curated + verified via the Discogs API, July 2026).

source_of_truth: discogs.com release pages (videos[]); per-item 'match' notes any deviation (search-found upload, alternate cut)
order: chronological by Discogs release date; year-only dates sort by year
